description: As a Clinical Application Coordinator, audit the Text Integration Utilities (TIU) Document Definition global (^TIU(8925.1)) in the VistA database using YDBGui. Distinguish between Classes (CL), Document Classes (DC), and Titles (TL) to identify at least 5 distinct entries that are 'Titles' (Type = TL). Generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/tiu_titles_report.txt containing one line per title in the format: 'IEN | NAME | TYPE'. The 'Type' is stored in the 4th piece of the zero-node (^TIU(8925.1,IEN,0)).
